sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56096" key="katorou/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατορούω</orth>, <sense id="n56096.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rush downwards,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">h.Cer.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">341</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
